_meta.note: Community guides — each renders at /guides/<slug> from guides/view.html. Members are matched live from the directory by category (exact) and keyword (substring against name/category/keywords/tagline). Each guide has a featured-placement slot 'guide:<slug>' managed in Admin → Sponsorships.

guides.title: Senior Living & Resources
guides.lede: Trusted senior care, living communities, and support services across the West Valley.
guides.intro: The West Valley is one of Los Angeles' most senior-friendly communities — home to nationally recognized retirement communities, in-home care agencies, and advocacy organizations. Every provider listed here is a Chamber member business, accountable to our community.

guides.title: Health, Spas & Wellness
guides.lede: Hospitals, medical practices, spas, fitness, and wellness professionals in the West Valley.
guides.intro: From world-class hospitals like UCLA Health and Providence Cedars-Sinai Tarzana to neighborhood spas, chiropractors, and fitness studios — the West Valley is a healthcare and wellness hub. Find a Chamber member provider below.

guides.title: Home Improvement & Services
guides.lede: Contractors, plumbers, electricians, landscapers, and home pros you can trust.
guides.intro: Hiring for your home is easier when the business is a Chamber member — local, established, and invested in this community. From full remodels to a single repair, start here.
categories: Garage Door & Window Repair and Installation

guides.title: Entertainment & Things To Do
guides.lede: Theatres, events, recreation, and fun across the West Valley and Warner Center.
guides.intro: There's more to do in the West Valley than ever — live theatre, bowling, golf, wine tastings, and event pros who can turn any occasion into a memory. All Chamber members, all local.
categories: Party Equipment Rental - Special Events Consultants

guides.title: Schools & Education
guides.lede: Schools, tutoring, child care, and adult education in the West Valley.
guides.intro: The West Valley's schools — public, private, and specialty — are a major reason families put down roots here. These Chamber member schools and education services serve every age.

guides.title: Shopping & Retail
guides.lede: From Westfield Topanga & The Village to one-of-a-kind local shops.
guides.intro: Anchored by Westfield Topanga & The Village — one of the country's premier shopping destinations — and surrounded by specialty retailers you won't find anywhere else. Shop local, shop member.
